results.title: Vikram Sudarshan
highlights:
Industrial AI/ML | GenAI for Predictive Maintenance | Building Scaleable and Reliable AI Systems for Manufacturing | Senior Research Engineer @ Air Products
...
Senior Research Engineer - AI ML for IIoT and Advanced Diagnostics at [Air Products](https://www.linkedin.com/company/air-products)
...
As a PhD Candidate at the University of Pennsylvania, I am passionate about applying data science and machine learning to solve challenging problems in chemical and biomolecular engineering. My current research focuses on developing and applying path-sampling algorithms and applied machine learning techniques to predict and prevent rare abnormal events in chemical processes, such as explosions, fires, or leaks, that can cause environmental and economic damage. I have published multiple papers in peer-reviewed journals and presented my work at international conferences. In addition to my academic pursuits, I have also gained valuable industrial experience as a data science intern at Air Liquide, a global leader in industrial gases and services. There, I worked on a time-critical project to develop time-series forecasting models to predict economic turning points, and custom-built a real-time user-friendly sensitivity analysis simulation tool that analyzes the impact of key economic variables on key performance indicators. I also have previous internships at Arkema and Thyssenkrupp, where I conducted laboratory experiments and process engineering tasks. Through these internships, I have acquired important skills such as project management, communication, and teamwork. I hold a Master of Science and a Bachelor of Chemical Engineering from the University of Pennsylvania and the Institute of Chemical Technology, respectively. I have a deep passion for data science and look forward to developing and leveraging cutting edge tools in AI/ML to solve complex problems in healthcare and manufacturing. Please feel free to learn more about me and contact me via my website:
...

...
Benchmarking machine learning (ML) models is ubiquituous across scientific domains, but most studies focus on model accuracy and computational costs without significant emphasis on real-world decision-making.  In chemical processes, where data concerning safety and reliability are often highly imbalanced (i.e., rare), selecting the appropriate ML model is crucial to ensure safe and reliable plant operation.
...
To address this gap, our latest work introduces a comprehensive benchmarking  framework for rare event prediction.  We evaluate a range of ML models - from simpler algorithms like Linear Support-Vector Regressor and k-Nearest Neighbors, to advanced techniques such as Random Forests, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Dense Neural Networks, and TabNet.  By balancing model accuracy, computational efficiency, and alarm-system effectiveness, our findings identify optimal ML strategies for predicting abnormal rare events, enabling operators to enhance plant safety and reliability.
...
In this study, we developed novel, dynamic, multi-directional and multivariate alarm systems using path-sampling and machine learning for polymerization reactors operating at their unstable steady-states. 

We developed accurate XGBoost-based predictive models for the rare-event data simulated using path-sampling.  These advanced models, when deployed in real-time, generate on-line predictions for the committer probabilities, resulting in improved dynamic multivariate alarm systems.

#### Senior Advanced Analytics Lead (Current)
...
Building machine learning predictive models, mathematical optimization models, and simulations models for the business. Projects involve technical skills and knowledge of data analytics and machine learning, mathematical programming, and simulation and queueing theory along with consulting skills to interact with business stakeholders. Representative projects: Pricing project: A machine learning model is developed to provide a guideline of how to improve the company revenue through customers pricing without increasing the risk of loss. This requires the extraction of useful factor information from the past customer and pricing historical data, and apply them to generate the optimal price for each individual customers. Forecasting project: Facilitating business' medium-term tactical supply chain planning, we design a mixed approach forecasting model which applies traditional ARIMA/ETS forecasting methods and machine learning pattern recognition to generate individual customer demand forecasting. Optimization project: Huge portion of supply chain cost is the delivery of gas to customers. We build a vehicle scheduling algorithm which combines the local search concept and heuristic approaches. The proposed algorithm can generate scheduling trips as a guideline for the business, which helps the business to generate more efficient trip for gas delivery. Show less

🚀 Air Products’ Industrial Gases Power NASA’s Historic Return to the Moon

results.title: Lehigh Valley Jobs: Air Products: Lead Process Engineer
highlights: Req No. 2464BRJob Title LEAD PROCESS ENGINEEREmployment Status Full TimeEmployment Type ExemptCountry United StatesLocation US-PA-AllentownOrganization US - Technology (all except Elect/High Temp/Advanced)Job Description and Qualifications Air Products and Chemicals, Inc., a Fortune 500 manufacturer of industrial gases and chemicals, has immediate openings in our Process Data Technologies team for talented engineers with an interest in various aspects of data collection, analysis, modeling and productivity. Successful candidates will use their skills to leverage process data as a means of supporting and driving productivity programs for our differentiated businesses and global operations.Specific activities will focus on the areas of empirical modeling of chemical processes, image analysis, process optimization, supply chain analysis and other data driven technologies. You will be involved in technology development programs from concept initiation through commercialization, working closely with team members from our engineering, operations, and business teams around the world. You must be able to develop a credible business case to support ideas for new data driven technology programs, and to participate effectively on or lead the multi-disciplinary teams that will develop and execute these ideas. Much of the work load will center on performance monitoring and other productivity improvement efforts.These jobs are located at our corporate headquarters in Trexlertown, Pennsylvania.The Process Data Technologies team is part of our Process and Separations Center, an R&D organization focused on research into and development of improved chemical processes and cycles, as well as the scale-up and commercialization of new products. These jobs require 25 – 30% travel to operating facilities around the world, and support potential career paths in R&D, operations or engineering, depending on personal interests.Position Qualifications & Requirements:- A minimum of five years experience with the practical application of innovative solutions in industrial and business settings,with a focus on productivity and/or data analysis applications.- PhD (preferred) or M.Sc. in Engineering, Physics, or Computer Science, specializing in one or more of the following: image analysis, applied statistics, advanced control, optimization, financial modeling- Experience with multiple programming languages, particularly MATLAB, C++ or SAS- A track record of championing new ideas and technology- Strong verbal and written communications skills- Ability to effectively contribute to multi-disciplinary project teams.Air Products (NYSE:APD) serves customers in industrial, energy, technology and healthcare markets worldwide with a unique portfolio of atmospheric gases, process and specialty gases, performance materials, and equipment and services. Founded in 1940, Air Products has built leading positions in key growth markets such as semiconductor materials, refinery hydrogen, home healthcare services, natural gas liquefaction, and advanced coatings and adhesives. The company is recognized for its innovative culture, operational excellence and commitment to safety and the environment. Air Products has annual revenues of $10 billion, operations in over 40 countries, and 22,000 employees around the globe. For more information, visit www.airproducts.com.To apply for this position, please visit the Air Products Career Center at www.airproducts.com/careers. Click on North America, then select Career Center. You can apply specifically to Job Req #2464BR. If you are a current Air Products employee, please apply via APOnline by clicking on Online Applications, then selecting Career Center.We thank all applicants in advance for their interest; however, only those applicants who are being considered for an interview, or are currently employed by Air Products, will be contacted.Air Products is an equal opportunity employer (M/F/D/V) where diversity matters.Type of Relocation

results.title: Shadab Patel
highlights:
Transitioning to People Data & Insights Analyst (Jan 2025) at Air Products | HR Data Analytics Professional | Formerly Talent Acquisition Specialist at Air Products
...
People Data & Insights Analyst at [Air Products](https://www.linkedin.com/company/air-products)
...
Transitioned to People Data & Insights Analyst | Leveraging 12+ Years of Talent Acquisition Expertise. With a strong foundation in Talent Acquisition, I've recently transitioned into a People Data and Insights Analyst role, where I'll drive data-informed decisions to shape Air Products' workforce strategies. Previously, as a Talent Acquisition Specialist at Air Products (March 2019 - Dec 2024), I successfully sourced, screened, and hired top talent for technical roles. Collaborating with stakeholders, I crafted competitive offers aligning with our company's values and culture. My tenure includes dedicated service to Air Products India (~6 years) and supporting our joint venture, Jazan Integrated Gasification and Power Company (JIGPC), in Saudi Arabia (July 2023). With experience spanning India and Saudi Arabia, I bring a global perspective to talent management. I'm passionate about harnessing data insights to propel Air Products forward as a leading global provider of industrial gases and solutions. Feel free to connect and explore how data-driven approaches can shape the future of talent management!
...
#### People Data & Insights Analyst (Current)
...
During my tenure in the Middle East region (July 2023 to December 2024), 1) Spearheaded talent acquisition for JIGPC's Middle East operations, focusing on Project Delivery, Engineering, and Procurement roles. 2) Collaborated with subcontractors to recruit contingent workers and permanent staff for JIGPC's projects, utilizing platforms like Bayt.com and LinkedIn. 3) Proficient in evaluating candidate profiles, conducting interviews, and making data-driven hiring recommendations. 4) Facilitated weekly update meetings to review recruitment progress and address challenges. 5) Prioritized diversity initiatives, emphasizing cultural and geographical representation in the talent pool. 6) Excelled in stakeholder and candidate management, ensuring a seamless recruitment process. 7) Implemented the company's ATS system (Kenexa BrassRing) to maintain compliance and efficiency. During my tenure in the India region (March 2019 to Jun 2023), 1) Managed recruitment for Air Products & Chemicals' Project Execution, Engineering, and Procurement units across Pune and Vadodara. 2) Oversaw the complete recruitment life cycle, focusing on mid and senior-level positions. 3) Conducted job intake calls promptly to understand role requirements. 4) Utilized diverse channels for effective talent scouting. 5) Collaborated with recruitment consultancies to fulfill vacancies. 6) Screened candidate profiles within the Kenexa ATS. 7) Advocated for diversity objectives to foster inclusive hiring practices. results.title: AI & Data Engineer (Generative AI) H/F - Paris, France - Air Liquide
highlights:
AI & Data Engineer (Generative AI) H/F - Paris, France - Air Liquide Skip to main content
...
## AI & Data Engineer (Generative AI) H/F
...
Le département Digital \& IA d'Air Liquide IT a été créé pour soutenir les ambitions du Groupe en matière de gestion des données, fournir une expertise technologique pour le développement de nouvelles solutions différenciantes pour l'activité d'Air Liquide, avec un accent particulier sur les sujets liés aux données.
...
Contribuez aux programmes entrepris par Digital \& IA en apportant votre expertise en ingénierie des données et en Machine Learning afin de créer et de maintenir des données et l'IA.
...
En tant qu'AI \& Data Engineer, spécialisé en IA Générative et intégré(e) à une squad produit, vous concevrez, construirez et optimiserez des solutions basées sur l'AI, évolutives, efficaces et fiables, au service des activités d'Air Liquide.
...
* Collaborer avec les architectes, les data scientists, les développeurs de logiciels et les product managers pour intégrer les solutions d'AI générative dans les produits. * Déployer et optimiser les systèmes d'IA dans l'écosystème d'Air Liquide, en assurant la conformité avec les standards internes pour l'infrastructure, les politiques d'accès aux data, les contraintes de latence et les KPIs de performance. * Optimiser la fiabilité, la latence et les coûts des systèmes d'IA générative. * Mettre en œuvre l'observabilité pour les appels LLM (Large Language Model), incluant la journalisation structurée, le traçage, les tableaux de bord et les alertes. * Travailler en étroite collaboration avec l'équipe AI Platform pour traduire les besoins des produits en demandes de fonctionnalités. * Assurer la formation, le mentorat et le partage de connaissances avec les autres ingénieurs au sein de l'équipe. * Participer activement aux cérémonies Agile et au travail d'équipe pour atteindre les objectifs du sprint.
...
**Compétences Techniques :**
...
* 5 ans d'expérience dans des rôles dans des rôles MLOps, DevOps ou d'infrastructure cloud, axée sur le déploiement, le monitoring et la mise à l'échelle des systèmes, est un atout. * Expertise démontrée en Python appliquée à des projets data ou AI. * Expérience avec les principaux services AI des fournisseurs cloud. * Expérience préalable en LLM sur les prompts système et utilisateur, l'appel de tools et fonctions, les systèmes d'agents, ou le RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). * Bon niveau d'anglais et de français à l'oral et à l'écrit.
...
Le candidat idéal aurait une expérience préalable alignée sur notre environnement technologique, notamment :
...
* Services AI GCP (Google Cloud Platform) : Vertex AI, Agent Space, Gemini. * Prisme.ai.
...
* Forte appétence pour la collaboration transversale, capable de s'aligner étroitement avec les data scientists, les software engineers et les parties prenantes métier pour s'assurer que les solutions techniques apportent une réelle valeur. * Excellentes compétences en communication et en collaboration avec des équipes et des parties prenantes mondiales. * Forte capacité à expliquer des concepts techniques et à encadrer des ingénieurs juniors/intermédiaires. * Intelligence émotionnelle pour maintenir un environnement de travail positif et serein.
...

Product & Technology · Basel Office - MDPI Headquarters
...
# Data Scientist (100%)
...
## Drive innovation in machine learning and AI, from research to deployment, creating scalable intelligent systems that power the next generation of scientific discovery.
...
Are you passionate about turning complex data into intelligent, production-ready solutions while supporting the future of open-access science? We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team and help design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning solutions that power intelligent, data-driven products. This role focuses on NLP, recommender systems, and agentic LLM workflows, turning complex business challenges into scalable and impactful analytical solutions.
...
This is an opportunity to work at the forefront of machine learning and AI, contributing to innovative systems that leverage state-of-the-art research in practical applications.
...
Core Responsibilities
...
Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning and statistical models, with a focus on NLP, recommender systems, and LLM-based solutions.
...
Translate business problems into data-driven approaches and scalable analytical solutions.
...
Perform data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for modeling.
...
Develop, optimize, and benchmark models using appropriate metrics and validation strategies.
...
Build and experiment with LLM-powered systems, including agentic workflows and RAG.
...
Investigate, reproduce, and compare research prototypes and state-of-the-art methods.
...
Collaborate with engineering teams to support the integration of models into production.
...
Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.
...
Bachelor’s degree/ Master's degree in Computer Science or related.
...
2-5 years of experience as a Data Scientist.
...
2–5 years of experience in Python (including complex applications), Machine Learning, and LLMs.
...
Strong background in data science, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.
...
Intermediate proficiency in FastAPI, Celery, and Keycloak.
...
Intermediate proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Hugging Face.
...
Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP), including tokenization and named entity recognition (NER).
...
In-depth understanding of Artificial Intelligence principles.
...
Strong working knowledge of Microsoft O365 tools.

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.
...
- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures

- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Jobflarely
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Jobflarely
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | CareerSync
highlights:
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
AI-powered products and platforms that generated measurable business impact (revenue growth, cost reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...
Experience with responsible AI frameworks, model governance, and AI regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).
...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.
